description_long: This is a stone obelisk mounted on a multi-tiered square base, commonly found in urban parks or plazas. The obelisk features a vertical shaft with a rectangular cross-section, rising from a central pedestal. On two opposing sides, there are semi-circular basins or troughs, likely intended as drinking fountains, with a spout above each basin. One side of the shaft displays an engraved plaque or inscription, while the other sides are plainer, with one side showing a small square panel. The base consists of three progressively smaller square platforms, with the topmost platform supporting the obelisk and a small central block at the front. The structure is predominantly gray stone, with some reddish-brown elements on the basins.
description: A gray stone obelisk with semi-circular drinking basins on two sides, mounted on a stepped square base and featuring engraved details.
description_view_0: Front view showing a semi-circular basin, a spout above it, and a small central block at the base.
description_view_1: Side view with a square panel on the shaft and both semi-circular basins visible protruding from the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view with another semi-circular basin and spout, similar to the front but without the central block at the base.
description_view_3: Side view featuring an engraved plaque or inscription on the shaft and both basins visible.
attribute_inscription: One side of the shaft features an engraved plaque with text, likely in English, though the specific content and legibility are not clear from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: Minimal ornamentation; the main decorative elements are the semi-circular basins and the engraved plaque.
attribute_base_design: The base is a three-tiered square platform made of stone, with each tier slightly smaller than the one below. The top tier has a small central block at the front, and the overall design is simple and robust.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and unadorned, maintaining the rectangular cross-section with no additional decoration.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a paved stone platform, flush with the base, with no additional features such as fences, statues, or vegetation visible.
